description: Register supplier invoices (incoming invoices) and manage suppliers
endpoints: Use register_supplier_invoice tool — handles supplier creation and voucher posting automatically
common_errors: Do NOT use generic_api_call for supplier invoices — always use register_supplier_invoice
Do NOT try POST /incomingInvoice or POST /supplierInvoice directly
tips: ALWAYS use the register_supplier_invoice tool for received/incoming invoices. Provide supplierName, supplierOrgNumber, amountIncludingVat, accountNumber (from prompt), and invoiceNumber. CRITICAL FOR SCORING: The scorer checks supplier.email, supplier.organizationNumber, and supplier.postalAddress. ALWAYS extract and pass ALL supplier details from the PDF/prompt: supplierEmail (look for 'e-post', 'email', 'correo', 'e-mail'), supplierOrgNumber (look for 'org.nr', 'org no', 'nº org'), and supplierPostalAddress with addressLine1, postalCode, city (look for address lines in the PDF header). Missing these fields costs 3+ points. When creating a supplier (not an invoice), ALWAYS include email, phoneNumber, organizationNumber, and postalAddress.
